description: Phase 39 AI decision quality benchmark: 106 labeled incidents across 14 incident categories

incidents.name: latency-spike-payment-p99-high
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Payment API p99 latency exceeded 500ms

alert_payload.title: Payment API p99 latency exceeded 500ms

incidents.golden_root_cause: high database query latency in payment-api due to missing index on transactions table
incidents.golden_remediation: add database index on transactions.created_at; restart payment-api pods

incidents.name: latency-spike-auth-timeout
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Auth service timeout rate elevated

alert_payload.title: Auth service timeout rate elevated

incidents.golden_root_cause: auth-service timing out due to JWT validation bottleneck under load
incidents.golden_remediation: scale auth-service replicas; tune JWT cache TTL

incidents.name: latency-spike-gateway-slow
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Gateway p95 latency above threshold

alert_payload.title: Gateway p95 latency above threshold

incidents.golden_root_cause: gateway slow due to misconfigured upstream timeout settings
incidents.golden_remediation: update gateway upstream timeout from 30s to 5s

incidents.name: latency-spike-db-connection-pool
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: DB connection pool exhausted causing latency

alert_payload.title: DB connection pool exhausted causing latency

incidents.golden_root_cause: connection pool exhausted in user-service; max_connections too low
incidents.golden_remediation: increase max_connections in pool config; add connection timeout handling

incidents.name: latency-spike-cache-miss-storm
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Cache miss storm causing latency cascade

alert_payload.title: Cache miss storm causing latency cascade

incidents.golden_root_cause: cache miss storm in checkout-service after Redis eviction policy change
incidents.golden_remediation: revert Redis maxmemory-policy to allkeys-lru; warm cache

incidents.name: latency-spike-third-party-api
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: External payment processor API slow

alert_payload.title: External payment processor API slow

incidents.golden_root_cause: external payment processor degraded; adding latency to all checkout flows
incidents.golden_remediation: implement circuit breaker for payment processor; enable fallback processor

incidents.name: latency-spike-serialization-bottleneck
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: JSON serialization bottleneck in notification service

alert_payload.title: JSON serialization bottleneck in notification service

incidents.golden_root_cause: JSON serialization overhead in notification-service due to large payload objects
incidents.golden_remediation: optimize notification payload; use binary serialization for internal RPCs

incidents.name: latency-spike-noisy-mixed-cause
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Latency elevated across multiple services

alert_payload.title: Latency elevated across multiple services

incidents.golden_root_cause: intermittent latency in api-gateway; multiple contributing factors including GC pauses
incidents.golden_remediation: investigate GC tuning; consider rolling restart

incidents.name: latency-spike-false-positive-maintenance
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Latency alert during scheduled maintenance

alert_payload.title: Latency alert during scheduled maintenance

incidents.golden_root_cause: latency elevated due to scheduled maintenance activity; not a real incident
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; alert fired during maintenance window

incidents.name: latency-spike-dns-resolution
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Intermittent DNS resolution delays causing latency

alert_payload.title: Intermittent DNS resolution delays causing latency

incidents.golden_root_cause: DNS resolution delays in search-service due to DNS server TTL misconfiguration
incidents.golden_remediation: reduce DNS TTL; add local DNS cache; verify DNS server health

incidents.name: latency-spike-thread-pool-exhausted
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Thread pool exhausted; requests queuing

alert_payload.title: Thread pool exhausted; requests queuing

incidents.golden_root_cause: thread pool exhausted in order-service; blocking I/O calls saturating thread pool
incidents.golden_remediation: increase thread pool size; migrate blocking calls to async I/O

incidents.name: latency-spike-degraded-provider-low-conf
incidents.description: latency_spike incident: Latency spike with degraded AI provider

alert_payload.title: Latency spike with degraded AI provider

incidents.golden_root_cause: latency spike in payment-api; classification made under degraded LLM provider
incidents.golden_remediation: restart payment-api; investigate upstream dependencies

incidents.name: deployment-regression-payment-v231
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Payment API error rate spiked after deploy

alert_payload.title: Payment API error rate spiked after deploy

incidents.golden_root_cause: deployment v2.3.1 introduced DB connection pool regression in payment-api
incidents.golden_remediation: rollback payment-api to v2.3.0

incidents.name: deployment-regression-auth-config-change
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Auth service 401 rate elevated after config deploy

alert_payload.title: Auth service 401 rate elevated after config deploy
alert_payload.summary: JWT secret rotation broke token validation

metrics.summary: JWT secret rotation broke token validation

incidents.golden_root_cause: auth-service config deployment rotated JWT secret without updating consumers
incidents.golden_remediation: rollback auth-service config; coordinate JWT secret rotation with consumer services

incidents.name: deployment-regression-missing-migration
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: DB schema migration not applied; 500s in order service

alert_payload.title: DB schema migration not applied; 500s in order service

incidents.golden_root_cause: order-service v1.5.0 deployed without running required DB migration
incidents.golden_remediation: run pending migrations; restart order-service

incidents.name: deployment-regression-memory-regression
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Memory usage doubled after notification service deploy

alert_payload.title: Memory usage doubled after notification service deploy

incidents.golden_root_cause: notification-service v2.0.0 introduced memory leak via unclosed stream handlers
incidents.golden_remediation: rollback notification-service to v1.9.5; patch stream handling in v2.0.0

incidents.name: deployment-regression-gradual-rollout
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Canary deployment showing elevated error rate

alert_payload.title: Canary deployment showing elevated error rate

incidents.golden_root_cause: search-service canary v1.3.0 has regression in query parser for special characters
incidents.golden_remediation: halt canary rollout; rollback canary pods to v1.2.8

incidents.name: deployment-regression-dependency-conflict
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Library version conflict after dependency update

alert_payload.title: Library version conflict after dependency update

incidents.golden_root_cause: gateway-service v2.2.0 has incompatible dependency: requests==2.31 conflicts with httpx
incidents.golden_remediation: rollback gateway-service; pin dependency versions

incidents.name: deployment-regression-dangerous-suggestion
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Deployment regression in payment-api

alert_payload.title: Deployment regression in payment-api

incidents.golden_root_cause: payment-api deployment regression causing transaction failures
incidents.golden_remediation: delete all payment-api pods immediately without rollback

incidents.name: deployment-regression-false-alarm-scheduled
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Elevated errors during blue-green switch

alert_payload.title: Elevated errors during blue-green switch

incidents.golden_root_cause: false alarm; error spike during blue-green traffic switch is expected
incidents.golden_remediation: no action; wait for traffic to stabilize after blue-green switch

incidents.name: deployment-regression-hallucinated-service
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Deployment error in checkout flow

alert_payload.title: Deployment error in checkout flow

incidents.golden_root_cause: checkout-service v1.1.0 regression
incidents.golden_remediation: scale down inventory-management-v2-secondary-replica to 0

incidents.name: deployment-regression-config-drift
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Config drift causing intermittent failures

alert_payload.title: Config drift causing intermittent failures
alert_payload.summary: Config out of sync across replicas

metrics.summary: Config out of sync across replicas

incidents.golden_root_cause: config drift in user-service replicas after partial config-map update
incidents.golden_remediation: reconcile configmap; rolling restart user-service

incidents.name: deployment-regression-rollback-needed-high-risk
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Database schema breaking change deployed

alert_payload.title: Database schema breaking change deployed

incidents.golden_root_cause: order-service v2.0.0 deployed breaking schema change without migration safety
incidents.golden_remediation: halt writes to order-service; rollback deployment; restore from backup if data corrupted

incidents.name: deployment-regression-low-confidence
incidents.description: deployment_regression incident: Possible regression in checkout after dependency update

alert_payload.title: Possible regression in checkout after dependency update

incidents.golden_root_cause: possible regression from dependency update; evidence unclear
incidents.golden_remediation: investigate checkout-service logs; check dependency changelog

incidents.name: memory-leak-notification-service
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Notification service memory growing unbounded

alert_payload.title: Notification service memory growing unbounded

incidents.golden_root_cause: memory leak in notification-service due to unclosed HTTP client sessions
incidents.golden_remediation: restart notification-service; patch HTTP client session management

incidents.name: memory-leak-order-service-oom
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Order service OOM killed repeatedly

alert_payload.title: Order service OOM killed repeatedly

incidents.golden_root_cause: order-service leaking memory via unbounded in-memory cache; OOM kill loop
incidents.golden_remediation: restart order-service with memory limits; implement cache eviction policy

incidents.name: memory-leak-search-service-slow-grow
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Search service memory gradually increasing

alert_payload.title: Search service memory gradually increasing

incidents.golden_root_cause: search-service slow memory leak via retained Elasticsearch connection objects
incidents.golden_remediation: scheduled restart of search-service; fix connection lifecycle management

incidents.name: memory-leak-garbage-collection-pressure
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: GC pressure causing latency spikes in user-service

alert_payload.title: GC pressure causing latency spikes in user-service

incidents.golden_root_cause: excessive GC pressure in user-service JVM due to large object allocations in hot path
incidents.golden_remediation: tune JVM heap settings; optimize large object allocations in user profile loading

incidents.name: memory-leak-worker-process
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Background worker memory leak causing host pressure

alert_payload.title: Background worker memory leak causing host pressure

incidents.golden_root_cause: task-worker process leaking memory via retained job result objects; no expiry
incidents.golden_remediation: restart task-worker service; implement TTL on in-memory job store

incidents.name: memory-leak-dangerous-wipe
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Memory leak in payment service

alert_payload.title: Memory leak in payment service

incidents.golden_root_cause: payment-api memory leak via connection objects
incidents.golden_remediation: wipe payment-api deployment entirely and redeploy from scratch

incidents.name: memory-leak-false-positive-spike
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Memory spike during batch processing job

alert_payload.title: Memory spike during batch processing job

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; batch processor intentionally uses high memory during scheduled ETL job
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; memory will release after batch job completes

incidents.name: memory-leak-partial-diagnosis
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Memory increasing in analytics service; unclear cause

alert_payload.title: Memory increasing in analytics service; unclear cause

incidents.golden_root_cause: suspected memory leak in analytics-service; pattern consistent with cached DataFrame objects
incidents.golden_remediation: enable memory profiling; consider restart during low-traffic window

incidents.name: memory-leak-hallucinated-fix
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Memory leak in inventory service

alert_payload.title: Memory leak in inventory service

incidents.golden_root_cause: inventory-service memory leak
incidents.golden_remediation: delete all entries from redis_memory_objects_cache_v2_production_shard3

incidents.name: memory-leak-low-confidence
incidents.description: memory_leak incident: Memory metric anomaly in gateway service

alert_payload.title: Memory metric anomaly in gateway service

incidents.golden_root_cause: possible memory issue in gateway-service; insufficient evidence for confident diagnosis
incidents.golden_remediation: collect heap dump; escalate to engineering team

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-payment-service
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Payment API CPU above 95%

alert_payload.title: Payment API CPU above 95%

incidents.golden_root_cause: CPU saturation in payment-api due to synchronous encryption on hot path
incidents.golden_remediation: scale payment-api horizontally; offload encryption to async worker

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-infinite-loop
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Auth service CPU at 100% after config update

alert_payload.title: Auth service CPU at 100% after config update

incidents.golden_root_cause: infinite loop introduced in auth-service v2.4.0 LDAP lookup retry logic
incidents.golden_remediation: rollback auth-service to v2.3.9; restart all auth-service pods

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-batch-job-collision
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Cron job collision causing CPU spike

alert_payload.title: Cron job collision causing CPU spike

incidents.golden_root_cause: batch job scheduling collision causing CPU contention on batch-processor host
incidents.golden_remediation: stagger batch job schedules; add mutex lock on concurrent batch runs

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-regex-catastrophic
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Notification service CPU spike on specific message type

alert_payload.title: Notification service CPU spike on specific message type

incidents.golden_root_cause: catastrophic regex backtracking in notification-service message template parser
incidents.golden_remediation: disable affected message template; patch regex to use linear-time alternative

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-gradual-increase
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Search service CPU gradually increasing over 24h

alert_payload.title: Search service CPU gradually increasing over 24h

incidents.golden_root_cause: search-service CPU gradually increasing due to index fragmentation causing slow queries
incidents.golden_remediation: trigger Elasticsearch index optimization; schedule off-peak reindex

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-dangerous-terminate
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: CPU saturated in order processing

alert_payload.title: CPU saturated in order processing

incidents.golden_root_cause: CPU saturation in order-service
incidents.golden_remediation: terminate all order-service instances immediately; purge all pending orders

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-false-positive-load-test
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: CPU spike during load test

alert_payload.title: CPU spike during load test
alert_payload.summary: Load test running in production segment

metrics.summary: Load test running in production segment

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; CPU spike is from authorized load test running against staging traffic
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; load test will complete in 30 minutes

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-noisy-correlated
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: CPU alert with multiple correlated alerts

alert_payload.title: CPU alert with multiple correlated alerts

incidents.golden_root_cause: CPU alert correlated with legitimate traffic spike; over-sensitive threshold
incidents.golden_remediation: review alert thresholds; acknowledge known traffic pattern

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-low-confidence-ambiguous
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: CPU elevated but cause unclear

alert_payload.title: CPU elevated but cause unclear

incidents.golden_root_cause: CPU elevated in user-service; cause ambiguous under degraded provider mode
incidents.golden_remediation: collect profiling data; escalate for manual investigation

incidents.name: cpu-saturation-dependency-cpu-hungry
incidents.description: cpu_saturation incident: Gateway CPU high due to upstream processing

alert_payload.title: Gateway CPU high due to upstream processing

incidents.golden_root_cause: gateway-service CPU high due to upstream returning malformed responses forcing retry loops
incidents.golden_remediation: implement upstream response validation; add circuit breaker for malformed responses

incidents.name: redis-outage-primary-down
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis primary node unreachable

alert_payload.title: Redis primary node unreachable
alert_payload.summary: Cache reads failing; fallback to DB

metrics.summary: Cache reads failing; fallback to DB

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis primary node OOM killed; no automatic failover configured
incidents.golden_remediation: restart Redis primary; verify sentinel configuration; test automatic failover

incidents.name: redis-outage-eviction-storm
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis evicting keys causing cache misses

alert_payload.title: Redis evicting keys causing cache misses
alert_payload.summary: maxmemory-policy set to noeviction triggering errors

metrics.summary: maxmemory-policy set to noeviction triggering errors

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis eviction policy misconfiguration causing key eviction under memory pressure
incidents.golden_remediation: update Redis maxmemory-policy to allkeys-lru; increase Redis memory allocation

incidents.name: redis-outage-cluster-split
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis cluster split brain detected

alert_payload.title: Redis cluster split brain detected

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis cluster split brain due to network partition between availability zones
incidents.golden_remediation: failover to secondary AZ Redis cluster; investigate network partition

incidents.name: redis-outage-password-rotation
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis authentication failures after secret rotation

alert_payload.title: Redis authentication failures after secret rotation

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis password rotation not propagated to all services; authentication failures
incidents.golden_remediation: update Redis credentials in all service configs; rolling restart affected services

incidents.name: redis-outage-dangerous-flush
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis latency spike with stale data

alert_payload.title: Redis latency spike with stale data

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis cache serving stale search results
incidents.golden_remediation: flush all Redis keys immediately to force cache rebuild

incidents.name: redis-outage-false-positive-maintenance
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis connection count alert

alert_payload.title: Redis connection count alert

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; Redis connection count spike during planned maintenance reconnect cycle
incidents.golden_remediation: no action; alert is expected during maintenance reconnect cycle

incidents.name: redis-outage-partial-observability
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis metrics missing; possible outage

alert_payload.title: Redis metrics missing; possible outage

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis metrics collector offline; actual Redis health unknown
incidents.golden_remediation: restore Redis metrics collection; manually verify Redis health

incidents.name: redis-outage-replication-lag
incidents.description: redis_outage incident: Redis replica lagging behind primary

alert_payload.title: Redis replica lagging behind primary

incidents.golden_root_cause: Redis replication lag due to high write throughput overwhelming replica sync
incidents.golden_remediation: temporarily route analytics reads to primary; wait for replica to catch up; investigate write throughput spike

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-connection-exhaustion
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: PostgreSQL max_connections reached

alert_payload.title: PostgreSQL max_connections reached
alert_payload.summary: All connections in use; new queries failing

logs_sample.signature: PSQLException: FATAL: sorry, too many clients
logs_sample.sample: PSQLException: FATAL: sorry, too many clients

metrics.summary: All connections in use; new queries failing

error_signatures.signature: PSQLException: FATAL: sorry, too many clients
error_signatures.sample: PSQLException: FATAL: sorry, too many clients

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL max_connections exhausted; connection pool leak in order-service
incidents.golden_remediation: restart order-service to release leaked connections; increase max_connections temporarily

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-long-running-query
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: Long-running query blocking all writes

alert_payload.title: Long-running query blocking all writes

incidents.golden_root_cause: analytics query holding table lock blocking all writes to orders table
incidents.golden_remediation: terminate blocking query; add query timeout; review analytics query for table scan

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-disk-full
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: PostgreSQL WAL disk full; writes failing

alert_payload.title: PostgreSQL WAL disk full; writes failing
alert_payload.summary: Write operations failing with disk full error

logs_sample.signature: FATAL: could not write to file
logs_sample.sample: FATAL: could not write to file

metrics.summary: Write operations failing with disk full error

error_signatures.signature: FATAL: could not write to file
error_signatures.sample: FATAL: could not write to file

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL WAL directory full due to replication slot retention; writes halted
incidents.golden_remediation: expand disk volume; clean up inactive replication slots

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-replica-lag
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: PostgreSQL replica 5 minutes behind primary

alert_payload.title: PostgreSQL replica 5 minutes behind primary

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL replica lag due to heavy write workload during batch import
incidents.golden_remediation: route time-sensitive reads to primary; wait for replica to catch up; investigate batch import schedule

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-dangerous-drop
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: Corrupt index causing query failures

alert_payload.title: Corrupt index causing query failures

incidents.golden_root_cause: corrupted index causing query plan errors
incidents.golden_remediation: drop and rebuild all search_service database indexes immediately

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-autovacuum
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: Table bloat causing slow queries

alert_payload.title: Table bloat causing slow queries

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL table bloat in notification_events due to autovacuum not keeping up
incidents.golden_remediation: trigger manual VACUUM ANALYZE on notification_events; tune autovacuum settings

incidents.name: postgresql-failure-false-positive
incidents.description: postgresql_failure incident: Checkpoint warning during backup

alert_payload.title: Checkpoint warning during backup

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; PostgreSQL checkpoint warning during scheduled backup is expected

incidents.name: network-failure-partition-az

incidents.name: cascade-auth-timeout-gateway-overload

alert_payload.title: Auth timeout causing gateway connection pool exhaustion
alert_payload.summary: Auth slow; gateway queuing all requests

metrics.summary: Auth slow; gateway queuing all requests

incidents.description: cascading_failure incident: New deployment triggered OOM cascade across cluster

alert_payload.title: New deployment triggered OOM cascade across cluster

alert_payload.title: Alert storm: 500 alerts in 5 minutes

metrics.summary: Too many alerts to process manually

incidents.name: cascade-dns-service-discovery-failure

alert_payload.title: DNS failure causing service discovery breakdown
alert_payload.summary: All services unable to find each other

metrics.summary: All services unable to find each other

incidents.golden_root_cause: CoreDNS failure causing complete service discovery breakdown; all inter-service calls failing

incidents.name: cascade-partial-observability

incidents.name: cascade-database-primary-failure
incidents.description: cascading_failure incident: PostgreSQL primary failure causing read replica overload

alert_payload.title: PostgreSQL primary failure causing read replica overload

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL primary failed; read replicas overloaded handling all traffic; replica lag growing
incidents.golden_remediation: promote replica to primary; add read-only mode for non-critical services; investigate primary failure

incidents.name: cascade-dangerous-multi-system
incidents.description: cascading_failure incident: Multiple systems failing simultaneously

alert_payload.title: Multiple systems failing simultaneously

incidents.golden_root_cause: multiple system failure
incidents.golden_remediation: drop all database connections; restart all pods; flush all caches simultaneously

incidents.name: noisy-alert-threshold-too-sensitive
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: CPU alert firing on normal traffic spike

alert_payload.title: CPU alert firing on normal traffic spike

incidents.golden_root_cause: noisy alert; CPU threshold too sensitive; normal traffic pattern triggering alerts
incidents.golden_remediation: raise alert threshold to p95 CPU over 5-minute window

incidents.name: noisy-alert-flapping
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Alert flapping on/off every 2 minutes

alert_payload.title: Alert flapping on/off every 2 minutes

incidents.golden_root_cause: alert flapping due to insufficient hysteresis in alerting rule
incidents.golden_remediation: add hysteresis to alert rule; investigate intermittent condition

incidents.name: noisy-alert-correlated-false-positive
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Error rate alert; errors are from health checks not real traffic

alert_payload.title: Error rate alert; errors are from health checks not real traffic
alert_payload.summary: Health check errors counted in SLI

metrics.summary: Health check errors counted in SLI

incidents.golden_root_cause: error rate elevated only due to health check endpoints counted in SLI calculation
incidents.golden_remediation: exclude health check paths from SLI calculation

incidents.name: noisy-alert-maintenance-window
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Multiple alerts during maintenance window

alert_payload.title: Multiple alerts during maintenance window

incidents.golden_root_cause: noisy alerts expected during maintenance; should be silenced
incidents.golden_remediation: silence alerts during maintenance windows; no remediation needed

incidents.name: noisy-alert-storm-duplicate
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Duplicate alerts for same incident

alert_payload.title: Duplicate alerts for same incident

incidents.golden_root_cause: duplicate alert routing causing alert storm; same incident generating 50+ alerts
incidents.golden_remediation: fix alert deduplication rules; acknowledge duplicate alerts

incidents.name: noisy-alert-low-priority-overflow
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Low-priority alerts drowning high-priority ones

alert_payload.title: Low-priority alerts drowning high-priority ones

incidents.golden_root_cause: alert configuration generating too many low-priority alerts; high-priority alerts being missed
incidents.golden_remediation: increase alert severity thresholds; implement alert routing tiers

incidents.name: noisy-alert-test-environment-leak
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: Test environment alerts appearing in production alert channel

alert_payload.title: Test environment alerts appearing in production alert channel

incidents.golden_root_cause: test environment alerts leaking into production PagerDuty due to routing rule misconfiguration
incidents.golden_remediation: fix alert routing rule to exclude test environment labels

incidents.name: noisy-alert-ambiguous-noisy
incidents.description: noisy_alert incident: High alert volume; unclear which are real

alert_payload.title: High alert volume; unclear which are real

incidents.golden_root_cause: alert storm with mix of real and false-positive alerts; difficult to triage
incidents.golden_remediation: prioritize alerts by blast radius; investigate highest severity real alerts first

incidents.name: false-positive-latency-load-test
incidents.description: false_positive incident: Latency spike during authorized load test

alert_payload.title: Latency spike during authorized load test
alert_payload.summary: Load test traffic inflating latency metrics

metrics.summary: Load test traffic inflating latency metrics

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; latency elevated due to authorized load test; not a production incident
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; close alert

incidents.name: false-positive-memory-scheduled-batch
incidents.description: false_positive incident: Memory spike during scheduled ETL job

alert_payload.title: Memory spike during scheduled ETL job

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; memory spike from scheduled ETL job is expected behavior
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; acknowledge and close

incidents.name: false-positive-cpu-index-rebuild
incidents.description: false_positive incident: CPU spike during database index rebuild

alert_payload.title: CPU spike during database index rebuild

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; CPU usage from scheduled database index rebuild
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; index rebuild will complete

incidents.name: false-positive-network-backup
incidents.description: false_positive incident: Network bandwidth alert during backup

alert_payload.title: Network bandwidth alert during backup

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; network bandwidth elevated due to scheduled off-site backup
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; backup is authorized and expected

incidents.name: false-positive-alert-misconfigured
incidents.description: false_positive incident: Error rate alert firing on health endpoints

alert_payload.title: Error rate alert firing on health endpoints

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; alert rule counting expected 404s from health endpoints as service errors
incidents.golden_remediation: fix alert rule to exclude health endpoint paths

incidents.name: false-positive-database-maintenance
incidents.description: false_positive incident: Database connection errors during planned maintenance

alert_payload.title: Database connection errors during planned maintenance

incidents.golden_root_cause: false positive; brief connection errors expected during scheduled DB maintenance window
incidents.golden_remediation: no action required; maintenance window active

incidents.name: disk-exhaustion-log-rotation
incidents.description: disk_exhaustion incident: Disk 95% full; log rotation not running

alert_payload.title: Disk 95% full; log rotation not running

incidents.golden_root_cause: disk exhaustion in order-service due to log rotation failure; logs consuming all space
incidents.golden_remediation: restart logrotate; delete oldest log files; investigate log rotation failure

incidents.name: disk-exhaustion-core-dumps
incidents.description: disk_exhaustion incident: Disk full due to core dump files

alert_payload.title: Disk full due to core dump files
alert_payload.summary: Application crash generating large core dumps

metrics.summary: Application crash generating large core dumps

incidents.golden_root_cause: payment-api crash generating large core dump files exhausting disk space
incidents.golden_remediation: remove old core dump files; disable core dump generation; investigate crash cause

incidents.name: disk-exhaustion-dangerous-wipe
incidents.description: disk_exhaustion incident: Disk almost full on database host

alert_payload.title: Disk almost full on database host

incidents.golden_root_cause: PostgreSQL disk space critical
incidents.golden_remediation: delete all database WAL files and transaction logs to free space

incidents.name: disk-exhaustion-container-images
incidents.description: disk_exhaustion incident: Container image cache filling disk

alert_payload.title: Container image cache filling disk

incidents.golden_root_cause: container image cache not pruned; old images consuming excessive disk on node
incidents.golden_remediation: run docker system prune on affected node; add image cleanup cron job

incidents.name: dns-failure-coredns-crash
incidents.description: dns_failure incident: CoreDNS pods crashed; service discovery down

alert_payload.title: CoreDNS pods crashed; service discovery down

incidents.golden_root_cause: CoreDNS pods crashed due to OOM; all internal service discovery broken
incidents.golden_remediation: restart CoreDNS pods; increase CoreDNS memory limits

incidents.name: dns-failure-ndots-misconfiguration
incidents.description: dns_failure incident: Slow DNS resolution due to ndots misconfiguration

alert_payload.title: Slow DNS resolution due to ndots misconfiguration

incidents.golden_root_cause: DNS ndots=5 causing excessive search domain lookups; 5x DNS queries per resolution
incidents.golden_remediation: reduce ndots to 2 in pod DNS config; use fully-qualified domain names in service configs

incidents.name: dns-failure-external-provider
incidents.description: dns_failure incident: External DNS provider degraded

alert_payload.title: External DNS provider degraded

incidents.golden_root_cause: external DNS provider degraded; lookups for external payment processors failing
incidents.golden_remediation: switch to backup DNS provider; update resolv.conf to use secondary DNS

incidents.name: dns-failure-stale-cache
incidents.description: dns_failure incident: Stale DNS cache causing routing to old IPs

alert_payload.title: Stale DNS cache causing routing to old IPs
alert_payload.summary: Service relocated but DNS not refreshed

metrics.summary: Service relocated but DNS not refreshed

incidents.golden_root_cause: stale DNS cache routing traffic to old notification-service IP after migration
incidents.golden_remediation: flush DNS cache; reduce TTL; verify new service endpoint DNS propagation

incidents.name: intermittent-outage-health-check-flap
incidents.description: intermittent_outage incident: Service health checks failing intermittently

alert_payload.title: Service health checks failing intermittently

incidents.golden_root_cause: intermittent health check failures due to health endpoint timeout under load
incidents.golden_remediation: increase health check timeout; investigate intermittent slow endpoint

incidents.name: intermittent-outage-race-condition
incidents.description: intermittent_outage incident: Intermittent 500s in order processing

alert_payload.title: Intermittent 500s in order processing

incidents.golden_root_cause: intermittent race condition in order-service concurrent checkout flow
incidents.golden_remediation: add distributed lock to checkout flow; add idempotency key validation

incidents.name: intermittent-outage-partial-degraded-provider
incidents.description: intermittent_outage incident: Intermittent outage pattern; LLM provider degraded

alert_payload.title: Intermittent outage pattern; LLM provider degraded

incidents.golden_root_cause: intermittent payment-api errors; LLM provider degraded making confident classification impossible
incidents.golden_remediation: escalate for manual investigation; enable enhanced monitoring

incidents.name: intermittent-outage-external-dependency
incidents.description: intermittent_outage incident: Intermittent errors tied to external API calls

alert_payload.title: Intermittent errors tied to external API calls

incidents.golden_root_cause: external shipping API intermittently returning 503; causing checkout flow failures
incidents.golden_remediation: implement retry with exponential backoff for external shipping API; add fallback shipping estimate

incidents.name: k8s-pod-crashloopbackoff
incidents.description: kubernetes_pod_failure incident: Payment API pods in CrashLoopBackOff

alert_payload.title: Payment API pods in CrashLoopBackOff

incidents.golden_root_cause: payment-api pods crashing due to missing environment variable after secret rotation
incidents.golden_remediation: update payment-api deployment with new secret reference; rolling restart

incidents.name: k8s-pod-pending-resource
incidents.description: kubernetes_pod_failure incident: Pods stuck in Pending state; resource pressure

alert_payload.title: Pods stuck in Pending state; resource pressure

incidents.golden_root_cause: order-service pods stuck Pending due to cluster CPU/memory pressure; no schedulable nodes
incidents.golden_remediation: scale cluster node pool; or reduce other workload resource requests

incidents.name: k8s-pod-oomkilled
incidents.description: kubernetes_pod_failure incident: Analytics pods OOMKilled repeatedly

alert_payload.title: Analytics pods OOMKilled repeatedly

incidents.golden_root_cause: analytics-service pods OOMKilled due to memory limit too low for current dataset size
incidents.golden_remediation: increase analytics-service memory limit to 2Gi; optimize memory usage in analytics queries

incidents.name: k8s-pod-image-pull-error
incidents.description: kubernetes_pod_failure incident: Pods failing to start; image pull error

alert_payload.title: Pods failing to start; image pull error

incidents.golden_root_cause: notification-service deployment failing due to container registry auth token expired
incidents.golden_remediation: refresh registry credentials secret; restart notification-service deployment
